<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?> <phpdocumentor configVersion="3" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="https://www.phpdoc.org" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="data/xsd/phpdoc.xsd" > <title>Type Resolver</title> <paths> <output>build/docs</output> </paths> <version number="0.2.0"> <folder>latest</folder> <api> <source dsn="./"> <path>src/</path> </source> <output>api</output> <ignore hidden="true" symlinks="true"> <path>tests/**/*</path> <path>build/**/*</path> <path>var/**/*</path> <path>vendor/**/*</path> </ignore> <extensions> <extension>php</extension> </extensions> <ignore-tags> <ignore-tag>template</ignore-tag> <ignore-tag>template-extends</ignore-tag> <ignore-tag>template-implements</ignore-tag> <ignore-tag>extends</ignore-tag> <ignore-tag>implements</ignore-tag> </ignore-tags> <default-package-name>phpDocumentor</default-package-name> </api> <guide> <source dsn="."> <path>docs</path> </source> <output>guides</output> </guide> </version> <setting name="guides.enabled" value="true"/> <template name="default" /> </phpdocumentor>
